horizon.title: Artificial Intelligence Horizon Review
horizon.summary: Ongoing review of generative, embodied, and decision-support AI systems with focus on interpretability, accountability, and workforce impact.

horizon.title: Quantum Technology Review
horizon.summary: Assessment of quantum sensing, computation, and secure communication readiness for national infrastructure and research programs.

horizon.title: Biotechnology Horizon Review
horizon.summary: Scanning gene-editing, synthetic biology, and biomanufacturing developments with careful review of containment and biosafety implications.

readiness.title: AI Readiness Assessment
readiness.summary: Model evaluation, red-teaming, documentation, and incident-readiness checklist for high-impact public-sector AI deployments.

readiness.title: Digital Infrastructure Safeguards
readiness.summary: Supply-chain review, build provenance, failover design, and adversarial testing standards for foundational digital services.

readiness.title: Sensor and Edge System Safeguards
readiness.summary: Privacy, consent, power resilience, and tamper-resistance requirements for edge sensing and IoT deployments in public infrastructure.

ethics.title: Algorithmic Impact Review
ethics.summary: Mandatory equity, accuracy, and recourse review before automated systems influence public services, benefits, or enforcement outcomes.

ethics.title: Data Stewardship Policy
ethics.summary: Purpose limitation, minimization, retention, and consent standards for research and operational datasets used in emerging-technology systems.

ethics.title: Autonomous Systems Policy
ethics.summary: Human oversight, fail-safe behavior, liability assignment, and transparency requirements for autonomous and semi-autonomous systems.
